CalculatorInvocationResponse.description: Standard wire shape for any calculator invocation response.
CalculatorInvocationResponse.title: CalculatorInvocationResponse

CalculatorListing.description: One entry in the calculator-discovery listing (GET /v1/calculators).
CalculatorListing.title: CalculatorListing

DepreciationAuditAssetInput.description:
One asset row in a depreciation-audit batch.

Mirrors the upstream Prolog handler's accepted shape
(`app/server/depreciation_server.pl::handle_audit`); fields are
atom-pure carriers of identity per CLAWDOG/110 §3.3.

assetId.description: Caller-supplied stable identifier for the asset row.
assetId.title: Assetid

assetName.description: Free-text asset description. Used by the Prolog Tier-1 classifier (keyword_map/2 + Stopwords.pl) to resolve effective-life category.
assetName.title: Assetname

currentBookAccumDep.description: Current ledger-side accumulated depreciation balance at the transition date (AUD). The audit compares this against the ideal-method projection to detect material variance.
currentBookAccumDep.title: Currentbookaccumdep

taxMethod.description: The depreciation method historically applied on the tax side. Common values: 'dv' (diminishing value), 'pc' (prime cost). Used by the engine to surface a method-flag warning when the accounting-side ideal differs from the tax-side recorded method.
taxMethod.title: Taxmethod

DepreciationAuditAssetInput.title: DepreciationAuditAssetInput

DepreciationAuditInput.description:
Input for the Depreciation Audit endpoint.

Wire-shape mirrors the upstream Prolog `/api/v1/depreciation/audit`
handler: a transition_date, a method discriminator, and an
`assets_to_audit` batch.

The `method` field is constrained to the accounting-engine scope per
Andrew (2026-05-12 05:54 UTC): prime cost + diminishing value only.
The engine's `normalize_method/2` accepts `'dvmethod'` for DV; legacy
aliases on input are coerced to canonical strings before forwarding.

assetsToAudit.description: Batch of asset rows to audit. The engine processes them sequentially; total runtime is dominated by Tier-1 classifier lookups (keyword_map/2).
assetsToAudit.title: Assetstoaudit

method.description: Accounting-side ideal method to project. 'primecost' = straight-line; 'dvmethod' = diminishing value. The engine default is 'primecost' (matches handle_audit fall-through).
method.title: Method

transitionDate.description: ISO-8601 date marking the audit anchor (e.g. 2025-07-01 = FY2026 opening). The engine projects accumulated depreciation to this date and compares against current_book_accum_dep.
transitionDate.title: Transitiondate

DepreciationAuditInput.title: DepreciationAuditInput

FBTBoardInput.description:
Input for Phase 2h Board Fringe Benefit (engine: ``calculate_fbt_board``).

FBTAA s.36 (Compilation No. 95). Engine arithmetic at FBT_Engine.pl L2586.
Type 2 only. Sheet row 35 sheet-vs-statute divergence is parked under
OT #94; the predicate is statute-faithful.

membersOverTwelve.description: Number of employees/associates aged 12 or over (s.36(c)(ii)).
membersOverTwelve.title: Membersovertwelve

membersUnderTwelve.description: Number of family members under 12 years (s.36(c)(i)).
membersUnderTwelve.title: Membersundertwelve

over12MealsPerChild.description: Meals provided per 12+ employee/associate during the FBT year.
over12MealsPerChild.title: Over12Mealsperchild

under12MealsPerChild.description: Meals provided per under-12 family member during the FBT year.
under12MealsPerChild.title: Under12Mealsperchild

FBTBoardInput.title: FBTBoardInput

FBTCarOperatingCostInput.description:
Input for the FBT Car Operating Cost method (Phase 3a Cut A).

Field naming mirrors the upstream Prolog engine's request shape (snake_case
via FastAPI's alias mapping, accepting both snake_case and the camelCase
used by the existing fbt_tester.py compatibility surface).

acquisitionCost.description: Original acquisition cost (AUD) for the chained-DV walk; chained-DV entry-point. Mutually exclusive with opening_depreciated_value. When supplied with acquisition_date (and without opening_depreciated_value), the engine dispatches to the OT #81 chained-DV walk predicate (mc08).
acquisitionCost.title: Acquisitioncost

acquisitionDate.description: ISO date string (e.g. 2024-04-01); drives deemed-depreciation tier dispatch.
acquisitionDate.title: Acquisitiondate

businessUsePercentage.description: Business-use % of total operating costs. Clamped to [0, 100] by the engine.
businessUsePercentage.title: Businessusepercentage

daysHeldInFBTYear.description: Days the car was held during the FBT year [0..366]. Required for in-FY-acquisition chained-DV cases (acquisition_date within the FBT year) where the engine's default of 365 would over-state the partial-year leg. Multi-FY chains do NOT need this field (their FY2026 leg is always a full year).
daysHeldInFBTYear.title: Daysheldinfbtyear

employeeContribution.description: Post-tax employee contribution toward the benefit (AUD).
employeeContribution.title: Employeecontribution

formOfFinance.description: One of: owned | hire_purchase | leased | unspecified.
formOfFinance.title: Formoffinance

fuelRepairsServicing.description: Fuel + repairs + servicing for the period (AUD).
fuelRepairsServicing.title: Fuelrepairsservicing

leasePayments.description: Lease payments for the period (AUD); null/absent if not leased.
leasePayments.title: Leasepayments

openingDepreciatedValue.description: Opening depreciated value at start of FBT year (AUD). Mutually exclusive with acquisition_cost per engine Lesson #14 strict-validation (OT #81 Rung 2 mc07).
openingDepreciatedValue.title: Openingdepreciatedvalue

FBTCarOperatingCostInput.title: FBTCarOperatingCostInput

FBTCarParkingActualInput.description:
Input for Phase 2j Car Parking Actual Method (engine: ``calculate_fbt_car_parking_actual``).

FBTAA Division 10A simple-sum method. Engine arithmetic at FBT_Engine.pl L3237.

employeeContribution.description: Employee contribution (AUD); clamped at gross subtotal.
employeeContribution.title: Employeecontribution

spacesProvided.description: Number of car parking spaces provided.
spacesProvided.title: Spacesprovided

FBTCarParkingActualInput.title: FBTCarParkingActualInput

FBTCarParkingRegister12WkInput.description:
Input for Phase 2j Car Parking 12-Week Register (engine:
``calculate_fbt_car_parking_register_12wk``).

FBTAA s.39GB 12-Week Register method. Engine arithmetic at FBT_Engine.pl L3360.
WRT T1 sheet row 63 sheet-vs-statute divergence parked under OT #96.

benefitsInPeriod.description: Number of car parking benefits in the 12-week register period.
benefitsInPeriod.title: Benefitsinperiod

daysSpaceAvailable.description: Days the car parking space was available [0..366]; engine clamps at 366.
daysSpaceAvailable.title: Daysspaceavailable

employeeContribution.description: Employee contribution (AUD); clamped at gross subtotal.
employeeContribution.title: Employeecontribution

FBTCarParkingRegister12WkInput.title: FBTCarParkingRegister12WkInput

FBTCarParkingStatutory228Input.description:
Input for Phase 2j Car Parking 228-Day Statutory Formula (engine:
``calculate_fbt_car_parking_statutory_228``).

FBTAA s.39FA Statutory Formula method. Engine arithmetic at FBT_Engine.pl L3288.

daysCarParkingAvailable.description: Days the car parking benefit was available [0..366]; engine clamps at 366.
daysCarParkingAvailable.title: Dayscarparkingavailable

employeeContribution.description: Employee contribution (AUD); clamped at gross subtotal.
employeeContribution.title: Employeecontribution

FBTCarParkingStatutory228Input.title: FBTCarParkingStatutory228Input

FBTCarStatutoryFormulaInput.description:
Input for Phase 2l Car Statutory Formula (engine: ``calculate_fbt_car_statutory_formula``).

FBTAA s.9 Statutory Formula method (legacy v1; rate-table-fed). Engine
arithmetic at FBT_Engine.pl L927. Consumes the FY2026
``statutory-fraction`` + ``days-in-year`` rate-table fact-nodes per
Standing Rule #6 (the engine throws ``missing_rate(...)`` if absent).

baseValue.description: Statutory base value of the car (AUD).
baseValue.title: Basevalue

daysAvailable.description: Days the car was available for private use [0..366].
daysAvailable.title: Daysavailable

employeeContribution.description: Employee contribution (AUD); clamped DOWN so TV cannot go negative.
employeeContribution.title: Employeecontribution

FBTCarStatutoryFormulaInput.title: FBTCarStatutoryFormulaInput

FBTDebtWaiverInput.description:
Input for Phase 2b Debt Waiver Fringe Benefit (engine: ``calculate_fbt_debt_waiver``).

FBTAA s.16. Engine arithmetic at FBT_Engine.pl L3433. Type 2 only per
FBTAA; ``fbt_type`` echoed as 'Type 2'.

interestNoLongerCharged.description: Foregone interest no longer charged following the waiver (AUD); defaults engine-side to 0.
interestNoLongerCharged.title: Interestnolongercharged

FBTDebtWaiverInput.title: FBTDebtWaiverInput

employeeContribution.description: Employee contribution toward the expense (AUD); clamped at gross.
employeeContribution.title: Employeecontribution

expenseValue.description: Gross expense amount paid/reimbursed by the employer (AUD).
expenseValue.title: Expensevalue

inhouseBenefitClaimed.description: In-house benefit reduction claimed (AUD); only consulted on the in-house variant; clamped to FY2026 in-house cap (FBTAA s.62).
inhouseBenefitClaimed.title: Inhousebenefitclaimed

employeeContribution.description: Employee contribution toward the expense (AUD); clamped at gross.
employeeContribution.title: Employeecontribution

expenseValue.description: Gross expense amount paid/reimbursed by the employer (AUD).
expenseValue.title: Expensevalue

inhouseBenefitClaimed.description: In-house benefit reduction claimed (AUD); only consulted on the in-house variant; clamped to FY2026 in-house cap (FBTAA s.62).
inhouseBenefitClaimed.title: Inhousebenefitclaimed

FBTHousingInput.description:
Input for Phase 2f Non-Remote Housing Fringe Benefit (engine: ``calculate_fbt_housing``).

FBTAA s.26(1)(c) + s.26(2)(b). Engine arithmetic at FBT_Engine.pl L2761.
Indexation factor is period-scoped per s.26(2)(b); FY2026 published State
rates span 0.988 (TAS) to 1.100 (WA). C# range-clamp [0.001, 1.099] under-
indexes WA — mirrored here for parity (banked forward concern OT #95
sibling).

housingBenefitValue.description: Statutory annual value of the housing right at start of FBT year (AUD).
housingBenefitValue.title: Housingbenefitvalue

indexationFactor.description: State indexation factor per FBTAA s.26(2)(b). Out-of-range values (less than 0.001 or greater than 1.099) reset to 1.0 per C# clamp (under-indexes WA's 1.100).
indexationFactor.title: Indexationfactor

recipientRent.description: Rent paid by recipient to employer (AUD); reduces taxable value.
recipientRent.title: Recipientrent

FBTHousingInput.title: FBTHousingInput

FBTLafhaInput.description:
Input for Phase 2g LAFHA Fringe Benefit (engine: ``calculate_fbt_lafha``).

FBTAA s.31(2). Engine arithmetic at FBT_Engine.pl L2943. Always Type 2 per
ATO TR 96/9. ``exempt_food_component`` is the pre-computed scalar (TD 2025/2
composition lookup is sheet/UI-layer concern).

exemptAccommodationComponent.description: Total exempt accommodation component per s.31(2)(a) (AUD; not weekly).
exemptAccommodationComponent.title: Exemptaccommodationcomponent

exemptFoodComponent.description: Total exempt food component per s.31(2)(b) (AUD; not weekly). Caller computes via TD 2025/2 composition lookup; engine consumes scalar.
exemptFoodComponent.title: Exemptfoodcomponent

weeksLivedAway.description: Number of weeks the employee lived away from home.
weeksLivedAway.title: Weekslivedaway

FBTLafhaInput.title: FBTLafhaInput

FBTLoanInput.description:
Input for Phase 2a Loan Fringe Benefit (engine: ``calculate_fbt_loan_benefit_type_2``).

FBTAA Division 4 (ss.16–19). Engine arithmetic at FBT_Engine.pl L2434.
``fbt_benchmark_interest_amount`` is the DOLLAR amount (not the 0.0862
rate); the rate is applied upstream by the caller against
``original_loan_amount`` if supplied.

fbtBenchmarkInterestAmount.description: Benchmark FBT interest amount (AUD) per FBTAA Schedule 1. If omitted, derived from ``original_loan_amount`` × benchmark rate.
fbtBenchmarkInterestAmount.title: Fbtbenchmarkinterestamount

interestChargedByEmployer.description: Actual interest amount the employer charged the employee (AUD).
interestChargedByEmployer.title: Interestchargedbyemployer

originalLoanAmount.description: Original loan principal (AUD); only consulted when ``fbt_benchmark_interest_amount`` is absent.
originalLoanAmount.title: Originalloanamount

FBTLoanInput.title: FBTLoanInput

FBTMealEntertainment5050Input.description:
Phase 2k Meal Entertainment 50/50 Split (FBTAA s.37CA).

Engine ``method=50_50``; the multiplier is hard-coded to 50 inside the
engine when this method-atom dispatches.

eligibleMeals.description: Meals in an eligible in-house dining facility (s.54 FBTAA); AUD.
eligibleMeals.title: Eligiblemeals

employees.description: GST-inclusive meal entertainment expenditure on employees + other staff (AUD).
employees.title: Employees

employeesAssociates.description: Meal entertainment expenditure on associates of employees (AUD).
employeesAssociates.title: Employeesassociates

employeesNonassociates.description: Meal entertainment expenditure on clients + other non-associates (AUD).
employeesNonassociates.title: Employeesnonassociates

staffAmenities.description: Exempt employer-provided staff amenities (s.41 minor-benefits); AUD.
staffAmenities.title: Staffamenities

FBTMealEntertainment5050Input.title: FBTMealEntertainment5050Input

FBTMealEntertainmentRegister12WkInput.description:
Phase 2k Meal Entertainment 12-Week Register (FBTAA s.37CB).

Engine ``method=register_12wk``; ``register_percentage`` is REQUIRED.

eligibleMeals.description: Meals in an eligible in-house dining facility (s.54 FBTAA); AUD.
eligibleMeals.title: Eligiblemeals

employees.description: GST-inclusive meal entertainment expenditure on employees + other staff (AUD).
employees.title: Employees

employeesAssociates.description: Meal entertainment expenditure on associates of employees (AUD).
employeesAssociates.title: Employeesassociates

employeesNonassociates.description: Meal entertainment expenditure on clients + other non-associates (AUD).
employeesNonassociates.title: Employeesnonassociates

registerPercentage.description: Register percentage established under the 12-week sample register per s.37CC (0..100). Engine clamps at 100 if exceeded.
registerPercentage.title: Registerpercentage

staffAmenities.description: Exempt employer-provided staff amenities (s.41 minor-benefits); AUD.
staffAmenities.title: Staffamenities

gstInclusiveValue.title: Gstinclusivevalue

inhouseBenefitClaimed.description: In-house benefit reduction claimed (AUD); only consulted on the in-house variant; clamped to FY2026 in-house cap (FBTAA s.62).
inhouseBenefitClaimed.title: Inhousebenefitclaimed

gstInclusiveValue.description: GST-inclusive value of the property benefit (AUD).
gstInclusiveValue.title: Gstinclusivevalue

inhouseBenefitClaimed.description: In-house benefit reduction claimed (AUD); only consulted on the in-house variant; clamped to FY2026 in-house cap (FBTAA s.62).

gstInclusiveValue.title: Gstinclusivevalue

inhouseBenefitClaimed.description: In-house benefit reduction claimed (AUD); only consulted on the in-house variant; clamped to FY2026 in-house cap (FBTAA s.62).

employeeContribution.description: Employee contribution toward the residual benefit (AUD).

gstInclusiveValue.title: Gstinclusivevalue

FBTTebeInput.description:
Input for Phase 2i Tax-Exempt Body Entertainment (engine: ``calculate_fbt_tebe``).

FBTAA Subdivision B of Division 10 (ss.38–39). Engine arithmetic at
FBT_Engine.pl L3089. s.39 is a thin expenditure-passthrough statute.
50/50-split method is a sheet/UI-layer caller concern (the caller supplies
the post-50/50 totals; engine sums).

salaryPackagedMealEfle.description: Total expenditure on salary-packaged meal entertainment + EFLE for tax-exempt body employees (AUD).
salaryPackagedMealEfle.title: Salarypackagedmealefle

FBTTebeInput.title: FBTTebeInput

ManifestRateTableEntry.description: One entry in the manifest's ``rate_table_uris`` block (CLAWDOG/109 §7.1).
ManifestRateTableEntry.title: ManifestRateTableEntry

info.description:
**Architectural canon:** [CLAWDOG/109](https://github.com/futureWA/clawdog-brain/blob/master/GLOBAL_NOTES/CLAWDOG/109_CALCULATOR_CONSTELLATION.md)

**Outsource-boundary canon:** [CLAWDOG/110](https://github.com/futureWA/clawdog-brain/blob/master/GLOBAL_NOTES/CLAWDOG/110_OUTSOURCE_BOUNDARY_DISCIPLINE.md)

Phase 3a wires a single calculator (FBT Car Operating Cost). Phase 3c is the second-instance test of whether the abstraction holds.
info.summary: Phase 3a Egress Interface over the LodgeiT calculator pool. Implements the REST surface of CLAWDOG/109's tri-surface exposure model. Governed by CLAWDOG/110's five non-negotiables (manifest-fidelity, advisory-boundary, atom-vs-bridge, OpenAPI drift, Standing Rule #1).
info.title: ClawDog Calculator-Constellation REST API

get.description:
Return a minimal liveness response for the Cloud Run / Docker HEALTHCHECK.

Does NOT call into the upstream Prolog engine — that would couple the
REST liveness signal to the engine's readiness, which is a deliberately
independent dimension.

NOTE (mut-2026-05-25-mc11): Cloud Run / Google edge layer special-cases
the literal path ``/healthz`` and returns a Google generic 404 HTML page
to EXTERNAL public traffic, even when the route is correctly registered
in FastAPI and the deployed image contains the route bytes (verified
2026-05-25 00:39 UTC: external curl returns HTML 404 with
``content-type: text/html`` and NO ``server: Google Frontend`` header,
while FastAPI 404s return JSON ``{"detail":"Not Found"}`` with
``server: Google Frontend``; the HTML 404 is from a layer ABOVE GFE).
Cloud Run's INTERNAL startup/liveness probe path uses a different
network channel that bypasses this interception and DOES reach this
route successfully. The path stays at ``/healthz`` so the cloud-run.yaml
startupProbe/livenessProbe config continues to work; external operators
use ``/livez`` (added below) for public-traffic liveness checks.

Public-traffic liveness probe.

Mirror of ``/healthz`` at a non-reserved path. ``/healthz`` is
intercepted by Google's edge layer for external traffic (see ``healthz``
docstring); ``/livez`` is NOT reserved and routes correctly through
Google Frontend to FastAPI.

Same body shape as ``/healthz``. Does NOT call into the upstream Prolog
engine.

post.description: Single MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 entry point. POST a JSON-RPC envelope; receive a JSON-RPC result or structured error. Supported methods: ``tools/list``, ``tools/call``, ``resources/list``, ``resources/read``. Per MCP spec 2025-06-18.

get.description:
Return a manifest of the calculators wired into this Phase 3a deployment.

Phase 3a hardcodes one entry (FBT Car Operating Cost). Phase 3c onboards a
second calculator; the registry above grows but the route signature does not.

schema.title: Response List Calculators V1 Calculators Get

get.summary: List calculators available through the REST surface.

post.description: Phase 3c.3.B — onboards the upstream Depreciation Prolog engine's `/api/v1/depreciation/audit` endpoint through the REST surface. Cross-checks ledger-side `current_book_accum_dep` against the accounting-method projection (prime cost or diminishing value) at the supplied `transition_date`; surfaces a variance flag against the Brain-canon variance threshold (SBRM_RATE_TABLE/depreciation/<taxonomy>/<period>/audit-variance-threshold.md). Out of scope for β.2.B: `/resurrect` (asset register migration) and `/adjustment_journal` (Phase II pipeline) — each will land as a sibling route at the next depreciation onboarding rung.

parameters.description: Bare-atom taxonomy axis value per CLAWDOG/111 §2. Ratified set: lodgeit_au_sbrm | hoffman_base. At Phase 3c.3.B only lodgeit_au_sbrm is populated for depreciation; hoffman_base bundle authoring is deferred.
parameters.name: taxonomy

schema.description: Bare-atom taxonomy axis value per CLAWDOG/111 §2. Ratified set: lodgeit_au_sbrm | hoffman_base. At Phase 3c.3.B only lodgeit_au_sbrm is populated for depreciation; hoffman_base bundle authoring is deferred.
schema.title: Taxonomy
Response Invoke Depreciation Audit V1 Calculators Depreciation Audit  Period Uri  Post

post.summary: Invoke the Depreciation Audit endpoint for the given URN-encoded period.

post.description: Phase 3a Cut A — bare math + manifest + advisory. URL-encoded URN path params; the bridge re-validates them against the atom-vs-bridge boundary (CLAWDOG/110 §3.3) before forwarding to the Prolog engine. Response carries the calculator's native trace block, plus the manifest-fidelity block (live content_hashes per CLAWDOG/109 §7) and the advisory block (CLAWDOG/109 §6 / CLAWDOG/110 §3.2).

parameters.description: Bare-atom taxonomy axis value per CLAWDOG/111 §2. Ratified set: lodgeit_au_sbrm | hoffman_base. Default at Phase 3c.2: lodgeit_au_sbrm (only populated bundle). Strict-required discipline tightens at Phase 3c.3 when hoffman_base populates.
parameters.name: taxonomy

schema.description: Bare-atom taxonomy axis value per CLAWDOG/111 §2. Ratified set: lodgeit_au_sbrm | hoffman_base. Default at Phase 3c.2: lodgeit_au_sbrm (only populated bundle). Strict-required discipline tightens at Phase 3c.3 when hoffman_base populates.
schema.title: Taxonomy

schema.description: Calculator input body. The schema dispatched per `calc_uri` path param; see the `_CALC_INPUT_MODEL_REST` registry in `api/routes/calculators.py` for the per-URN pydantic class binding. FastAPI presents all wrapped input types as a Union; the route validates the body against the URN's specific class at request time and surfaces a structured 422 on mismatch.
schema.title: Body

post.summary: Invoke a calculator for the given URN-encoded period.

parameters.description: Bare-atom taxonomy axis value per CLAWDOG/111 §2. Default: lodgeit_au_sbrm.
parameters.name: taxonomy
